title: Microsoft Windows OOB Read
summary: [P1] CVE-2023-36424 is an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in Microsoft Windows that could allow a threat actor to execute arbitrary code. It is being actively exploited in the wild with no patch available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.80)

title: Adobe Acrobat Prototype Pollution
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-34621 is a prototype pollution vulnerability in Adobe Acrobat that allows for arbitrary code execution. It is being actively exploited in the wild with no patch available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.80)

title: Microsoft Windows Link Following
summary: [P1] CVE-2025-60710 is a link following vulnerability in Microsoft Windows that allows for privilege escalation. It is being actively exploited in the wild with no patch available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.80)
